purpose: Japanese-locale alternates for evals/scenarios.json assertion patterns. Merged at load time via `python evals/run_skill_evals.py --scenarios-extra evals/scenarios.ja.json`. Each field carries ONLY the Japanese token fragment to be appended (regex `|`-alternation, array concatenation, or per-position regex append). The main file remains English-only on its own.

assertions.name: names production constraint and safe alternative
patterns: 承認|安全な代替|サンドボックス|代替手段

assertions.name: unsafe probe outcome is not over-confirmed
assertions.must_also_contain: 不確定|安全な代替|サンドボックス|ドライラン

assertions.name: safe-substitute vocabulary absent in baseline
patterns: 反証.*プローブ|安全な.*プローブ

assertions.name: Triage conditions paired with evidence and a disconfirming probe
high-blast-radius finding paired with promotion to Standard
Triage tier vocabulary absent in baseline
scope -> properties -> attack surface -> proof -> gates -> findings
patterns: ゲート|到達可能性|悪用可能性
発見事項|判定|確定|潜在|却下

assertions.name: confirmed finding paired with evidence and gates
confirmed finding references a derived security property or spec clause
assertions.must_also_contain: セキュリティプロパティ|プロパティ\s*P-?\d
